title: Supply Chain Manager - RITES - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - RITES - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the RITES family as a Supply Chain Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About RITES:
RITES is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RITES!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
